ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "birthyear" INTEGER /* Year the player was born */,
  "birthmonth" INTEGER /* Month the player was born */,
  "birthday" INTEGER /* Day the player was born */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "playertype" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., singles, doubles) */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "current_city" TEXT /* Current city of the player */,
  "current_country" TEXT /* Current country of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "date_start" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "date_end" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tournament (e.g., Olympic, World Championship) */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "tournament_level" TEXT /* Level of the tournament (e.g., international, national) */,
  " Surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface used in the tournament (e.g., wood, synthetic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament where the match took place */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first player */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second player */,
  "score_player1" TEXT /* Score of the first player */,
  "score_player2" TEXT /* Score of the second player */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match (e.g., round of 32, quarterfinals) */,
  "game_format" TEXT /* Format of the game (e.g., best of 3, best of 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament for the statistics */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the tournament */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the tournament */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the player */,
  "points_lost" INTEGER /* Number of points lost by the player */,
  "aces" INTEGER /* Number of aces hit by the player */,
  "faults" INTEGER /* Number of faults committed by the player */,
  "smashes" INTEGER /* Number of smashes hit by the player */,
  "net_kills" INTEGER /* Number of net kills by the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the coach */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization area of the coach (e.g., technical, fitness) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_coaches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coaching relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coaching relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., referee, umpire) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_officials" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "official_id")
)
